HomeDestinationsBijanbari
West Bengal

Bijanbari

The Riverside Retreat

Riverside tranquility where clear mountain water flows over smooth stones, surrounded by mossy cliffs.

4.2
(54 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
22°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Bijanbari is a serene village along the Rangeet River, surrounded by tea gardens and cardamom plantations. A perfect offbeat getaway.

History

A traditional agricultural village known for its organic farming and peaceful environment.

Altitude

1,100 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Rangeet River

Crystal clear river with boulders and pools.

Heritage

Tea Gardens

Rolling tea estates with factory visits.

KuboVista

Natural Pool

A swimming hole in the Rangeet River.

Why visit: Refreshingly cold and secluded

Viewpoints

panoramic

Bijanbari Viewpoint

Views of the river valley and tea gardens.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

River View Diner

4.1

Local & Nepali • ₹200-400

Meals with views of the river.

Cafes

Riverside Cafe

4.0

Specialty: Herbal Tea

Relax by the river with herbal tea.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Organic Market

Fresh organic produce.

Organic cardamomTeaLocal honey

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

River Trekking

Easy

Trek along the Rangeet River.

4 hrs
₹1,000

Activities

  • • Arrive

  • • Tea garden visit
Lunch, Dinner
Taxi from NJP

₹2,000

Activities

Breakfast
Taxi
N/A
₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
